allow: Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./locales/ja.json'\); const o=j.orders||{}; ['fishTotal','commission','deliveryFee','deliveryNote','receiveAmount','quantity','gutProcessing','gutYes','gutNo','deliveryDate','deliveryTime','farmerCampaignDiscount','farmerCampaignDiscountValue','unitPrice','viewReviews','openMaps','reviewCount'].forEach\(k=>console.log\(k, '=>', JSON.stringify\(o[k]\)\)\); console.log\('--- has 注文内容/金額/レストラン keys? ---'\); console.log\('sectionAmount', o.sectionAmount, 'sectionOrderContent', o.sectionOrderContent\);")

PowerShell($f = "C:\\work\\FishLink\\pages\\restaurant\\orders.html"; $c = Get-Content $f -Raw; $start = $c.IndexOf\('<script type="module">'\); $end = $c.IndexOf\('</script>', $start\); $js = $c.Substring\($start + 22, $end - $start - 22\); $tmp = "C:\\work\\FishLink\\_tmp_orders_check.mjs"; Set-Content -Path $tmp -Value $js -Encoding utf8; node --check $tmp; if \($?\) { "PARSE OK" }; Remove-Item $tmp -Force)

Bash(node -e 'const j=require\("./locales/ja.json"\); function find\(o,p\){for\(const k in o\){const np=p?p+"."+k:k; if\(typeof o[k]==="string"\){if\(o[k].includes\("保存しました"\)\)console.log\(np,"=",o[k]\);}else if\(o[k]&&typeof o[k]==="object"\)find\(o[k],np\);}} find\(j,""\)')

PowerShell($files = @\("functions/index.js","pages/restaurant/cart.html","pages/restaurant/orders.html","pages/farmer/orders.html","pages/restaurant/payment.html","pages/farmer/payment.html","pages/restaurant/order.html","pages/restaurant/account.html","js/image-resize.js","js/data-cache.js","js/referral.js","pages/restaurant/account/referral.html","sw.js","css/style.css","js/recover.js","recover.html","register.html"\) ; foreach \($f in $files\) { $p = Join-Path "c:\\work\\FishLink" $f ; if \(Test-Path $p\) { $lines = \(Get-Content $p | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines ; Write-Output \("{0,6}  {1}" -f $lines, $f\) } else { Write-Output \("  N/A  {0}" -f $f\) } })

Bash(node -e "for \(const f of ['locales/ja.json','locales/en.json','locales/km.json']\){const j=require\('./'+f\); const k=j.notifMessages; const need=['deliveryStarted','deliveryArrived','deliveryDelayed','deliveredToBuyer','tradeCompletedReview','problemReportedFarmer','paymentUnconfirmed','couponExpiringSoon','declinedRefund','cancelledRefund']; const miss=need.filter\(x=>!k[x]\); console.log\(f, 'notif miss:', miss.length?miss:'none', '| review.backToOrderStatus:', !!j.review.backToOrderStatus, 'backToOrderCheck:', !!j.review.backToOrderCheck, '| pushOptin:', !!j.pushOptin\);}")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./locales/ja.json'\); console.log\('order.stock:',j.order&&j.order.stock\); console.log\('order.minOrder:',j.order&&j.order.minOrder\); console.log\('delivery keys sample:', j.delivery?Object.keys\(j.delivery\).slice\(0,5\):'no delivery ns'\)")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./locales/ja.json'\); const g=k=>k.split\('.'\).reduce\(\(a,x\)=>a&&a[x],j\); for\(const k of ['order.stock','order.minOrder','restaurant.stock','restaurant.minOrder','order.stockLabel','post.minOrder']\) console.log\(k,'=>',JSON.stringify\(g\(k\)\)\);")
